checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: issue_create implemented with create-or-verify semantics: searches for existing issue by exact title match; returns verified_existing if found; calls gh issue create if not. Pilot scope guard updated to allow all 6 operations. All per contract.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: issue_create operation in apply-mode pilot scope guard. command_boundary updated to apply-pilot-supports-all-six-operations. apply-unsupported-op test assertion updated. apply-mode always writes run artifact to $runPath. All validators and CLI tests pass.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changes limited to apply-mode execution block in specbridge.ps1 and the apply-unsupported-op test assertion. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment changes.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No protected files changed. No credentials accessed. No authentication or authorization changes. issue_create only reads issue title and goal from the operator context and calls gh issue create or gh issue list.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: CLI test suite passes. apply-unsupported-op test updated: command_boundary assertion matches apply-pilot-supports-all-six-operations. apply-blocked test still passes. All PASS, no FAIL.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI pending for issue 142 branch. Final report marks CI as not_collected. ci_wait operation will poll CI after PR is opened.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records the implementation: issue_create added with create-or-verify semantics, pilot scope guard expanded to all 6 operations, test assertion updated. Completion status is complete_pending_apply_mode_run. Risks documented.

findings.evidence: issue_create uses exact title match to detect existing issues. If the title contains special characters or GitHub search normalizes it, the match may fail and create a duplicate issue.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding a fuzzy-match fallback or a unique label per task_id in a future task.

findings.evidence: Issue 142 is the first live end-to-end run combining all 6 operations including ci_wait and post_merge_memory. ci_wait will poll CI for up to 10 minutes. post_merge_memory will create a closure branch and open a PR with auto-merge.
findings.recommendation: Monitor the apply-mode run log for ci_wait timeout or post_merge_memory branch push failures.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 142 branch.
Full 6-operation apply-mode loop first live run.
issue_create exact title match may produce duplicates if title is normalized differently by GitHub search.
